title: Glossier
tagline: Strong brand surface, weak homepage thesis — feels like a rolling promo. Variants try a JTBD chooser and a routine-led IA, plus a deliberate Glossier Pink in body.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful refresh. Mode A: pin palette and typography to the captured surface. Density: balanced. Three variants (conservative / compositional / bold).
movements: distinctiveness: familiar → distinctive (sharpen out of "default Apercu-on-white")
palette-distribution: pink only in footer → pink in footer + one in-body moment
tag-policy: up to 5 per card → 1 priority per card

originalCritique: The brand voice and palette are unmistakable — but the homepage is a rolling promo. Type sits at 12/14/16/20 with no display step the brand has earned. Cards stack five tags each (promo + scarcity + status + size + finish) so nothing reads as priority. Glossier Pink lives only in the footer — the brand's most valuable color is hidden. The page reads as commerce that forgot it was a brand.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA, refined tokens. Modular 1.25 scale with a 72px display moment in the hero; one priority tag per card; one in-body Glossier Pink moment beyond the footer.
variants.fix: Same IA, refined tokens. Modular 1.25 scale with a 72px display step the brand currently lacks. One priority tag per card (promo > scarcity > status); the other four go away. One Glossier Pink moment in body — not the footer ghetto. The page is the same Glossier; it just stops apologising for being Glossier.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: Routine-led IA. The home opens with a routine builder (cleanse → moisturise → finish), each step a Glossier product moment. Same palette, same type. Different homepage thesis.
variants.fix: Same palette, same type. Routine-led IA replaces the rolling promo. The home opens with a routine builder — cleanse → moisturise → finish — each step a single product moment. The page becomes a chooser, not a sale; the brand sells what to wear with what, not which SKU is on promo this week.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: Glossier Pink as a primary section ground, not an accent. One drenched-pink band carries a hero moment; everything else stays Apercu-on-white. The pink moment that the brand has been hiding from itself.
variants.fix: Glossier Pink as a primary section ground, not an accent. One drenched-pink band carries a hero product moment — full-bleed, lowercase intimate hero voice, single SKU. Everything else stays Apercu-on-white. The pink finally has the weight the brand has been refusing it.
